metaTitle: Televisions | The best deals on TVs, Smart TVs and more
metaDescription: Browse our Televisions range at Currys for unmissable deals on TVs, 90'' or more TVs and more. Available online for delivery or order & collect.
note: This is a category hub page, not a filtered product listing. Filters, sort, and view toggle live on /tv-and-audio/televisions/tvs. This page contains promotional carousels, category navigation, brand carousel, help cards, SEO content, and a Popular Products carousel.

promoBanners.title: Shop selected 75"+ TVs now. Pay nothing for delivery.
promoBanners.imageAlt: Shop selected 75"+ TVs now. Pay nothing for delivery.

promoBanners.title: Selected LG models interest free for 24 months. No deposit. No early fees. T&Cs apply*

promoBanners.title: selected Samsung TVs and claim up to £1000 of Samsung tech of your choice.
promoBanners.imageAlt: selected Samsung TVs and claim up to £1000 of Samsung tech of your choice.

servicePromoBanners.title: It pays to trade-in. Trade-in your used tech to get money off your next piece of kit. Magic.
Apple entertainment and more. On us. Get up to 2 months free with selected tech.
Tech now, pay later. Pay as much or as little as you like for 6 months.
Get your TV on your wall. Need a hand? Our expert installers will mount your TV to the wall for you.
Save 10% off Care & Repair on selected Large Screen TVs and Small Screen TVs.

helpCards.title: TV screen size
helpCards.description: TV screen size is measured diagonally from the bottom left corner to the top right. Use the same method to measure how much space you have, then shop by screen size.

helpCards.title: What is a smart TV?
helpCards.description: A smart TV has catch-up and on-demand streaming services built-in, so you don't need any extra sticks or boxes. Some also let you use social media, Spotify and games.

helpCards.title: Audio set-up
helpCards.description: Want a better listening experience than your in-built TV speaker? Look out for sound bars and other audio systems with surround sound, clear voice tech and object tracking.

helpCards.title: What is 4K Ultra HD?
helpCards.description: 4K Ultra HD is the name of the screen resolution four times clearer than a Full HD TV. It delivers a cinema quality picture, with crisp images and accurate colours.

featuredBanner.title: Introducing the new Sky Glass Air TV

flexpayInfo.disclaimer: Credit, offers and APR are subject to status and determined by the lender. 18+. Requires a Currys flexpay running credit account. Promotional interest rates may be offered on selected products from time to time. Minimum spend & exclusions apply. Missed payments may incur late fees/charges and impact your credit file.
